creator: javacaliente@gmail.com
text:
Double clicking on the FreeBSD-9.0-RELEASE-powerpc-bootonly.iso crashed the OS when in the Finder.
Double clicking on the said file in Disk Utility also crashed the system.


A note about the "Class:" drop down menu above, they could be better explained.

Fix: 

"Burn to Disc" seemed to work.
How-To-Repeat: Double click on the .iso
